_comment: Phase 3 generation input template. One operation per run. Port target: the user's separate health codebase plugs a differently-shaped JSON here; the generator itself does not change. See referencedocs/18_phase3_generation.md §14 and referencedocs/20_phase3_templates_and_kinds.md §4 for full semantics.
_comment_on_scope: v1 scope (§18 C21, 2026-04-23) ships four documents — time_analysis + initial_planning_guidance + warning_order + staff_brief. The full Steps 2–6 staff_estimate and the Step 7 operation_order stay deferred to v2 (§18 C17) via v1_scope: false at their YAML top level; the CLI skips them with a stderr log line even if flipped true below.

references.maps: خريطة استراتيجية مقياس 1:50,000 ورقة R-4، خريطة تكتيكية 1:100,000 ورقة R-4a

locations.area_of_interest: الحدود الشمالية من نقطة R-3 إلى R-7
locations.area_of_operations: المحور الشمالي — أرض حاكمة شمال خط الوسط
locations.civil_considerations: تجمعات سكانية متفرقة في القرى الشمالية، مع وجود مستشفى ميداني مدني

_comment_on_timing: total_available_minutes is the window from reporting_date_gregorian to h_hour_gregorian; all three must agree to the minute. compute_allocation raises on drift.

retrieval._comment_on_collections: Phase 3 v1 targets one collection per domain. Doctrine lives entirely in ingest__doctrine__bgem3; per-manual narrowing is done in the YAML templates via filters.source_doc allowlists, not by listing per-FM collections here. Future non-doctrine corpora (e.g. medical emergency) will be ingested into their own collections and added to this list by a template that targets them. See referencedocs/18_phase3_generation.md §6.4.
retrieval._comment_on_absent_collections: If a listed collection is not found in the _registry, the generator logs a warning and falls back to meta.default_collections from the template. Nothing aborts.

mission_intent_free_text: هجوم لواء مدرع على المحور الشمالي للاستيلاء على الأرض الحاكمة شمال خط الوسط وحرمان قوات العدو من حرية الحركة؛ المحافظة على إيقاع العمليات واستدامة القوة خلال 72 ساعة.

document_selection._comment: §18 C21 (2026-04-23): v1 ships four documents — time_analysis + initial_planning_guidance + warning_order + staff_brief. The full OPORD (operation_order) and full Steps 2–6 Staff Estimate (staff_estimate) stay v2 only; even if flipped true here the CLI v1-scope gate skips them with a stderr log line. See §18 C17 + §18 C21.
